falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 5200 on any daily session within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern relied on a higher low structure; a break below 5200 would violate the key support zone and invalidate the bottoming thesis, confirming continuation lower rather than accumulation

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 25 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The pattern match assumes volatility compression and fear exhaustion; sustained VIX above 25 indicates escalating panic not seen in the August 2024 bottom, breaking the analog's core behavioral signature

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% at any point
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A flight-to-quality bid this aggressive would signal recession panic or systemic stress, contradicting the soft-landing stabilization narrative embedded in the bottom_2024_aug pattern where yields stabilized in a range

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
